arts.ttl: Coventry City LIVE updates with Frank Lampard's first words as Doug King speaks out
arts.sum: Today's club press release read: " Coventry City are delighted to announce the appointment of Frank Lampard as the Club’s new Head Coach. "This followed an illustrious playing career, which saw him represent Chelsea 648 times and score 211 goals – becoming their record all-time goal-scorer.
